# Darts Daily
> Expert darts guides, product reviews and everything you need to know about darts.

## About
Darts Daily is a darts resource covering equipment reviews, setup guides, scoring rules and professional rankings. We help beginners and experienced players find the right gear and improve their game.

## Buying Guides
- [7 Best Dart Boards 2026](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/best-dart-boards): Comprehensive guide to the best bristle dartboards including the Winmau Blade 6, Blade 6 Dual Core, Blade 6 Triple Core, ONE80 Gladiator 3+, Viper Shot King, Unicorn Eclipse Pro 2 and Target ARC. Covers sisal construction, wiring systems, number ring rotation and setup tips.
- [7 Best Electronic Dart Boards 2026](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/best-electronic-dart-boards): Guide to the best electronic dartboards with automatic scoring and app connectivity. Features the Gran Board 3, Viper Solar Blast, Arachnid Cricket Pro 800 and more. Covers soft tip vs steel tip, Bluetooth connectivity and online multiplayer.
- [7 Best Darts for Beginners 2026](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/best-darts-for-beginners): Guide to the best tungsten darts for beginners covering the Target Hydro, Winmau Joe Cullen Special Edition, Red Dragon Javelin, Red Dragon Peter Wright Snakebite 3, Target Nathan Aspinall, Winmau MvG Aspire and Viper Blitz. Includes buying guide covering tungsten percentages, weight selection, grip patterns and essential accessories.

## Downloads
- [Downloads — Free PDC Draw Brackets](https://dartsdaily.net/downloads/): Free interactive draw brackets for every PDC European Tour and major tournament. Download the Excel file, enter match results as you watch and the bracket automatically updates through every round to the final. All players pre-filled from the official PDC draw. Works in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets. New bracket released for every event.

## Setup & Rules
- [Dart Board Distance & Height Guide](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/dart-board-distance-and-height): Official measurements for setting up a dartboard — bullseye height of 5ft 8in (1.73m), throwing distance of 7ft 9.25in (2.37m) for steel tip and 8ft (2.44m) for soft tip. Includes diagonal check method, wheelchair measurements and setup diagrams.
- [How to Score Darts — Complete Guide](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/how-to-score-darts): Complete guide to darts scoring covering board layout, segment values, 501 rules, checkout charts, Cricket scoring and common game variations. Explains doubles, trebles, bullseye scoring and finishing strategies.
- [Darts Rules — How to Play Darts](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/darts-rules): Complete beginner's guide to darts rules covering 501, 301, Cricket, Around the Clock, Killer, Shanghai and Halve-It. Includes dartboard layout explanation, scoring segments, common checkouts, bust rules, Cricket scoreboard format and darts etiquette.
- [How to Throw Darts — Technique Guide](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/how-to-throw-darts): Complete guide to throwing darts covering grip types (3-finger, 4-finger, pencil, front, rear), stance and foot position, aiming and sighting methods, throwing motion mechanics, release technique, follow-through, common mistakes, practice routines (20s practice, Around the Clock, Bob's 27, 100 darts at treble 20) and professional player techniques from Michael van Gerwen, Phil Taylor, Luke Humphries, Luke Littler, Peter Wright and Gary Anderson.

## Rankings
- [PDC Order of Merit 2026](https://dartsdaily.net/guides/pdc-order-of-merit): Current PDC rankings showing the top players, how the Order of Merit ranking system works, prize money distribution across tournaments and the two-year rolling ranking period.

## Products
- [Darts Products](https://dartsdaily.net/products): Curated collection of 53 darts products including dartboards, darts sets, flights, shafts, cases, lighting, mats and accessories from brands like Winmau, Target, Red Dragon, Shot, Viper and Unicorn.
